ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended (or is expected to end) */,
  "vcs_type" TEXT /* Type of version control system used */,
  "vcs_url" TEXT /* URL of the version control system repository */,
  "vcs_username" TEXT /* Username for version control system authentication */,
  "vcs_password" TEXT /* Password for version control system authentication */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "project_tags" TEXT /* Tags or categories for the project (e.g., web development, mobile app development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., FanOut, FanIn) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric and its significance */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., lines of code, number of classes) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric (e.g., integer, float) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project for which the metric is recorded */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being recorded */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of observations recorded */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the observations */,
  "std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the observations */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minimum value observed */,
  "q1" INTEGER /* First quartile of the data */,
  "median" INTEGER /* Median of the data */,
  "q3" INTEGER /* Third quartile of the data */,
  "max" INTEGER /* Maximum value observed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric value was collected */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the codebase */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval or margin of error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., default dashboard layout, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project metrics */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "browser_user_agent" TEXT /* Browser user agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold definition */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the threshold applies */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric for which the threshold is defined */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers alerts */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the threshold (e.g., greater than, less than, equal to) */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold value (e.g., absolute, percentage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship entry */,
  "metric_id_a" INTEGER /* ID of the first metric in the relationship */,
  "metric_id_b" INTEGER /* ID of the second metric in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., correlation, dependency) */,
  "strength" REAL /* Strength of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_relationships_metric_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id_b") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_relationships_metric_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id_a") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)
